allow: PowerShell($envBlock = Get-Process -Id 3876 | ForEach-Object { try { \(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$\($_.Id\)"\).CommandLine } catch { $null } } ; "CommandLine: $envBlock" ; $hasGroq = \(Get-Content -LiteralPath ".env.B3_LLM" | Where-Object { $_ -match '^GROQ_API_KEY=' }\) -ne $null ; "GROQ_API_KEY present in .env.B3_LLM: $hasGroq")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 4 ; Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='powershell.exe' OR Name='python.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'B3_LLM|agent\\.main' } | Select-Object ProcessId, ParentProcessId, Name, CommandLine | Format-Table -AutoSize -Wrap)
